quests.name: Foresting
quests.description: Help the forester with foresting stuff.

quests.name: Desert Quest
quests.description: Help the dying adventurer send a letter to his wife.

quests.name: Sea Activities
quests.description: A mysterious being needs your help under the sea.

quests.name: Ancient Lands
quests.description: Discover the lands that lie beyond the great mountains.

quests.name: Sorcery and Stuff
quests.description: Learn the basics to sorcery

quests.name: Miner's Quest
quests.description: The miner needs your help with acuqiring ore.

quests.name: Evil Santa
quests.description: The young sherpa on the mountain needs your help!

quests.name: Arts and Crafts
quests.description: Help the old lady on the great mountai with her crafts.

quests.name: Scavenger
quests.description: The local village girl needs your help to get out of her responsibilities.

quests.name: Miner's Quest II
quests.description: The miner is at it again, this time he doesn't just need ores.

quests.name: Royal Drama
quests.description: The king of Kaetram is in need of your help.

quests.name: Clam Chowder
quests.description: Some human being needs your help in the ice world.

quests.name: Royal Pet
quests.description: The king needs your help with distributing the good news to the people of Kaetram.

quests.name: Scientist's Potion
quests.description: The local scientist needs your help with creating his special potion.

quests.name: Anvil's Echoes
quests.description: The local blacksmith has lost his hammer and needs your help.

quests.name: Herbalist's Desperation
quests.description: A local herbalist is in dire need of rare herbs.

quests.name: Rick's Roll
quests.description: Rick needs help to make his famous roll to be together forever with his girlfriend.

quests.name: The Coder's Glitch
quests.description: The coder requires your help sorting out his bugs.

quests.name: The Coder's Glitch II
quests.description: The coder yet again needs your help with his silly glitches.

quests.name: Coder's Fallacy
quests.description: A distressed villager wants to talk to you.
